rationale: A half-precision NaN encoded with mantissa payload 0x01 (0xf9 0x7e 0x01) instead of the single canonical all-zero-mantissa payload (0xf9 0x7e 0x00). Well-formed IEEE-754 NaN, but violates the canonical-NaN-payload rule (P6/D6).
Half-precision signaling NaN (0x7c01: quiet bit clear, mantissa 1) instead of the canonical quiet 0x7e00.
Half-precision quiet NaN with a full non-zero mantissa payload (0x7fff) instead of the canonical 0x7e00.
Single-precision quiet NaN (0x7fc00000); any NaN must canonicalize to f16 0xf97e00 regardless of width.
Double-precision quiet NaN (0x7ff8000000000000); must canonicalize to f16 0xf97e00.
